title: Physics Ch1 Supplementary notes and exercise
subject: Physics

questions.subject: Physics
questions.prompt: Graph and proportion Aim : To understand how to plot agraph properly. (labelling, correct scale, correct line, etc To understand the information provided from the graph. Students are able to use graphical method or proportion /ratio to solve problems of linear relationship. Example The resistance Rof aresistance thermometer at different temperatures Tis shown. T / ’é░C 0 10 20 30 40 R / ’üŚ 12 23 35 50 61 (a) Plot agraph of RagainstT . (yaxis should be _____while xaxis should be ______) (b) What is the temperature whenR = 40 ’üŚ ? Method 1 , From the graph, WhenR = 40 ’üŚ, T = _____ oC Method 2, (By proportion /ratio /slope) 1 0 1 02 1 2 1 2 1 1 0 2 1 1 0 or = (concept of ratio of similar triangle or concept of slope)Y Y XXYY X X X X X X Y Y Y Y ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆĮ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ Take two points (62, 40) and (40, 15 ) as reference points. And then find out the coordinate of the point (40, T). 1 0 62 30 40 152 1 2 1 1 0 40 30 15 By = 15 40 15Then 22.840 30 62 30 o X X R R TTXX Y Y Y Y R R T T T T C ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ’ĆŁ ’ā× ’ĆĮ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ’ĆĮ ’ā× ’ĆĮ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ Please Check - Label the axes with correct unit. - Use crosses to mark the points on the graph - Draw asmooth line rather than joining the points together. The concept of slope will be introduced in Ch.9 in Book 3B Exercise

questions.subject: Physics
questions.prompt: The liquid column in an unmarked liquid in glass thermometer has different lengths Lwhen the temperature bulb is put into different beakers of water with different temperature Tas below. T / ’é░C 0 20 40 60 80 L / cm 5 9.5 13 16.5 21 (a) Plot agraph of LagainstT . (b) Find the length of the liquid column Lat 50 oC, (i) by using the graph ; (ii) by using calculation method. (c) Find the temperature when the liquid column Lis 30 cm. (Hint : 2 0 2 0 1 0 1 0 useY Y X X Y Y X X ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ’ĆĮ’ĆŁ ’ĆŁ ) __________ __________

questions.subject: Physics
questions.prompt: The length of the mercury thread in amercury-in-glass thermometer are 2 cm and 8 cm at 0 oC and 100 oC respectively. (a) Find the temperature when the length of the mercury thread is 6 cm. (b) Find the length of the mercury thread when the temperature is 45 oC.

questions.subject: Physics
questions.prompt: The markings on acalibrated thermometer have faded away. We know that the column lengths for 0 oC and 50 oC are 4 cm and 10 cm respectively. What is the column length for 70 oC?

options.option_text: When the wire is placed in liquid oxygen, the resistance falls to 3╬®. Estimate the temperature in oC of the liquid oxygen.
